summary: Made surgical seam edits to vary the chapter opening away from a matching dawn/time-of-day scaffold and to clarify the overnight setup for the first-ferry approach to Aminul in the next chapter.
edits: Rebuilt the opening paragraph around Nura and Halima's immediate paper-salvage action while preserving the same storm-damage inventory and aftermath.
Added a closing bridge that shows Nura repacking the market bag and Halima thinking ahead to the first ferry and Aminul.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example lines; none were present to replace.
